_comment: Default model registry + pricing for @altexo/ai-gen. This is DATA, not code — src/models.js loads it. Override entries without editing source by pointing AI_GEN_MODELS_CONFIG at a JSON file (per-model shallow replace). JSON has no comments; use `note` string fields. Pricing keys are strings ("5", "1K") — priceVideo/priceImage read them via bracket access, which coerces numeric indices to the matching string key.

nano-banana.note: Nano Banana Pro. 1K corrected from 0.039 to 0.134 (the 0.039 was a copy-paste of the Flash per-image price; Google bills 1K and 2K together).

gpt-image-1.note: OpenAI gpt-image-1 (DALL·E successor), via scripts/gen-openai.js. Needs OPENAI_API_KEY. No true 9:16 — the nearest vertical is 1024x1536 (2:3); the manifest records the actual pixel size. perImage ~0.25 at quality:high — verify the current OpenAI rate; cost is quality/size-dependent.

veo-fast.note: perSecond 0.15 is the audio-ON rate, which is correct for this codepath: src/veo.js generates audio by default. Audio-off Fast is ~0.10-0.12/s.

kling-master.note: UNVERIFIED: the official Kling 3.0 model map shows no `kling-v3-master` tier (std/pro/4k only). This id is a best-guess and may be a legacy v2 Master (5/10s) or invalid (`invalid model_name`). Kept at the legacy 5/10 durations; perSecond 0.14 reproduces the prior 5s=$0.70 / 10s=$1.40 points. Master omits the `mode` param. Audio requires pro mode — use kling-pro for sound.

kling-pro.note: kling-v3 (Kling 3.0) Pro. Duration is the integer range 3-15s (default 5) — verified against the official Kling model map + fal.ai/Replicate/Segmind v3 schemas. perSecond 0.084 derived from the prior 5s=$0.42 / 10s=$0.84 points (linear) — verify the live Kling 3.0 rate. `mode` is sent as a request param for non-master models. Native audio via `audio: true` → the official `sound: "on"` param; requires a single start frame (no image_tail). Audio billed at audioMultiplier (2x).

kling-std.note: kling-v3 (Kling 3.0) Std. Duration 3-15s (default 5). perSecond 0.042 derived from the prior 5s=$0.21 / 10s=$0.42 points — verify the live rate. Std is video-only (no native audio). Use kling-pro for sound.
